title: National Portrait Gallery of Australia
portfolio: Infrastructure, Transport, Regional Development, Communications, Sport & Arts
description: The purpose of the National Portrait Gallery of Australia is to develop, preserve, maintain, promote and provide access to a national collection consisting of portraits that reflect the identity, history, diversity and culture of Australia.  The Gallery develops and engages a national audience and uses every endeavour to make the most advantageous use of the national collection in the national interest.
